prompt:
You are a strict job-matching evaluator.
Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact schema:
{"fit": boolean, "score": number, "reason": string}

Rules:
- English only.
- Score must be 0 to 100.
- fit=true only when candidate has clearly relevant skills/experience.
- Keep reason short (max 2 sentences).
- Output JSON only, no markdown.

Candidate CV:
===========================================================================================================================================
SUMMARY

Fullstack developer with commercial experience building security integrations and automation systems for enterprise platforms. Skilled 
in Go, Typescript, Javascript, Docker, and Linux infrastructure, with hands-on experience developing malware detection pipelines, 
threatintelligence integrations, and RESTful APIs. Proven ability to work independently in remote environments, deliver production 
features, and learn new technologies quickly. Seeking remote fullstack or backend engineering role.

===========================================================================================================================================

SKILLS

Go, JavaScript/TypeScript, Bash & PowerShell Automation Scripting, Node.js, API Integration, Docker, Linux , Wazuh , PostgreSQL,
Next.js, React, Automation, System Integration

===========================================================================================================================================

WORK EXPERIENCE

GuardBear
Junior Software Engineer
Oct 2025 - Mar 2026
Remote

• Developed backend systems and security integrations for GuardBear threat intelligence and security automation platform serving 
commercial customers
• Built malware detection pipeline integrating ClamAV and Wazuh SIEM with Go backend, enabling automated file quarantine and 
remote management across distributed systems
• Developed threat intelligence integration combining MISP, GreyNoise, and AlienVault OTX for dynamic risk assessment using 
FAIR framework
• Implemented YARA rule engine for advanced malware detection and pattern matching in Go backend
• Created RESTful APIs for security dashboard and real-time security event monitoring
• Deployed containerized services using Docker on Linux infrastructure (Ubuntu Server)
• Wrote PowerShell & Bash automation scripts for active response workflows and system management
• Documented system architecture, integration patterns, and deployment procedures for knowledge transfer
• Technologies: Go, Typescript, Docker, Linux, Wazuh, PowerShell, Git, REST APIs, GRPC

Job:
Title: Senior Backend Developer
URL: https://www.onlinejobs.ph/jobseekers/job/test-123
Description:
We are looking for an experienced backend developer proficient in Go and PostgreSQL. Must have experience with Docker, Linux systems, and building RESTful APIs. Experience with security systems is a plus. Remote work available.
